use_cases: Form input for boolean selections in signup or settings forms
Agreement and consent checkboxes for terms of service
Multi-select options in lists or filtering interfaces
Toggle switches for feature flags or preferences
Interactive list item selection in dashboards or tables
ai_summary: A polished checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth scale animations on tap and hover. Uses CSS variables for theming compatibility and includes accessible focus states with ring styling. The checkmark SVG animates with pathLength for a satisfying visual confirmation when checked.
